note: Re-measured 2026-05-31 conc=1 (max-concurrency 1) on v0.5.12 + patch-041 GEMV, --disable-cuda-graph (preset default). SUPERSEDES the 2026-04-24 pre-v0.5.12 curve (24.1 short-ctx, TPOT 41.5 ms). The two DeltaNet-27B AWQ hybrids (this + Qwen3.5-27B) are measured-identical; 16K/65K here are from the Qwen3.5-27B twin's clean JSONL sweep (13.7 / 11.8). OPEN REGRESSION: decode is per-layer dispatch-bound (~1 ms/layer) — Devstral-2-24B (40L) hits 24 here, all 64L models (this hybrid + dense Qwen3-VL-32B) cluster ~14-15, so it's layer count not arch/quant/AWQ-Linear. cuda-graph gives NO decode speedup on v0.5.12 (verified 'cuda graph: True' on both dense + hybrid, still ~14-15). The April-24 stack got this 64L model to 24.1 (41.5 ms, ~0.65 ms/layer) — not reproducible now by flag or graph. Lever = per-layer kernel-launch overhead; bisect old vs v0.5.12. See README Open work #2.
